productDisplayName: U.S. Polo Assn. Men Solid Navy Blue Jacket
description: Composition Navy jacket made of 100% polyester, has long sleeves with ribbed cuffs, mock collar with a buttoned closure and knitted inner collar, zippered front closure, appliqued branding on the left chest and a ribbed hem Fitting Regular Wash care Dry clean only This jacket from US Polo is inspired by classic sport style staples. The sleek finish offers extra insulation in the cold. Layer it over t-shirts, denims and suede shoes to beat the winter chill. Model statistics The product is a size M on a model of height 6'1" and shoulders 18.5"
